title: picris autumnalis
intro: Picris autumnalis, also known as autumn hawk's beard or field hawk's beard, is a plant species in the dandelion family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Picris autumnalis include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Picris autumnalis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
